MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: L. Fiscella; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties, LLC is present. Represented by Donna Stern.
Daniel Stern, Esq. appearing for the Plaintiff.
Defendants Christopher Huffman, Evan Tartaglio and James Huffman are present.
Gary Williams, Esq. representing the defendants through limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem Sigrid Irias, litigants and counsel confer in Department 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of MAR-30-2015 is vacated.
